files.src/Contracts/DocumentationPage.php: adds title and body to the existing page value object
files.src/Contracts/DocumentationPageRepositor: defines save and page lookup operations
files.src/Models/DocumentationPageRecord.php: maps the package-owned Eloquent record and enum/date casts
files.src/Persistence/EloquentDocumentationPag: validates and persists pages and filters published lookup
files.src/DocaraServiceProvider.php: binds the repository and registers migrations
files.tests/TestCase.php: owns isolated file-backed SQLite setup and mandatory cleanup
files.tests/Feature/DocumentationPagePersisten: proves durability, filtering, uniqueness, memory rejection, and rollback
files.composer.json: pins Laravel 13, PHP 8.3 dependency resolution, provider discovery, and Testbench/PHPUnit commands
files.tools/larena-scope-check.php: supports glob patterns already declared by the launch record
